message:
refactor(widgets): use sort_unstable_by and extract shared comparator

Replace sort_by with sort_unstable_by in scorer and table hot paths to
avoid allocation overhead from stable sorting. Extract the duplicated
ranked-match comparison closure into a named function, and convert
iterator chains in count_word_boundaries/calculate_total_gap to explicit
loops for clarity and to avoid iterator adapter overhead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
